name: theme-propose
description: Non-destructive theme-framework proposal for a summarised source batch, and the governing theme manifest. Builds a digest of every enriched/summarised source, materialises a model-proposed theme framework (theme-proposal.json + a human-editable theme-proposal.md), and freezes the agreed framework — theme priorities + an editorial approach per theme + categorisation guidance — into theme-manifest.json that governs all subsequent theme-cluster/theme-entity runs. Never edits source files. Standalone CLI: theme-propose.
